title: Exspectriments
description: An addon to the Spectrum mod that adds some random things
body:
# Exspectriments

A simple personal addon mod for [Spectrum](https://modrinth.com/mod/spectrum).

Features:

- Lab Coats
- A method of getting some hostile drops without having to deal with mobs
- A method of automating pigments
- A new potion effect
- A printer (for more control over the color of dyeable items)
- Stops a certain entity from spawning in Peaceful mode
- Liquid Gems
  - A process to decraft vanilla-style gem blocks that involves liquid gems
